title: rubus × mirandus
intro: Rubus × mirandus, also known as the Boysenberry, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and loganberry (Rubus loganobaccus). The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × mirandus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and juices, which can be consumed fresh or dried for later use.
